query-mapping.description: Queries used to create the wiki sitemap.

class.name: AWA.Wikis.Models.Sitemap_Info
class.comment: The Sitemap_Info describes the information about public wiki pages for the sitemap generation

query.name: wiki-public-sitemap
query.comment: Get the list of public wiki pages with their last modification date
query.sql: SELECT wiki.wiki_id, wiki.name, content.create_date FROM awa_wiki_page AS wiki INNER JOIN awa_wiki_content AS content ON content.id = wiki.content_id WHERE wiki.is_public = 1 ORDER BY content.create_date DESC;
query.sql-count: SELECT count(wiki.id) FROM awa_wiki_page AS wiki WHERE wiki.is_public = 1
